In a vitamix blender, add all ingredients except oil, aleppo, and chives
Blend on high until smooth, then stream in Grapeseed Oil slowly to emulsify
Turn off blender and reserve to a mixing bowl
Add Aleppo Pepper and Chives and mix in with a whisk until homogenous
Reserve to quart containers and store in the cooler
